Subject: South Texas College of Law CLE
Message:
You are receiving this e-mail because you have been identified by the State Bar of Texas as having an November birthday.  If you need additional hours to meet your CLE requirements, please consider these courses. 
Unless you have requested to be on the South Texas College of Law CLE mailing list, you should only receive this mail out once per year. 
You may click on the links below or copy and paste a link into your address bar on your browser for information about upcoming CLE courses. 
Strictly Ethics - one hour video CLE     $35.00 http://www.stcl.edu/cle/strictlyethics.html  
Docket Call - by-the-hour video CLE        $35.00 per hour http://www.stcl.edu/cle/docket2001nov.html  
The Art of Negotiation "From Crisis to Collaboration" - live, two-day CLE course http://www.stcl.edu/cle/flmed2001.html
